sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96177" key="sta/qmhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στάθμ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n96177.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">measuring</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">weighing</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2334.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nausiph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
